# 🎓 Admissions Now Open for Fall 2026 Intake!

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/727491925_122186850290926864_8491896422706435845_n-768x768.jpg)

Begin your journey at Lahore LEADS University — Islamabad Campus, ideally located in the heart of the capital.

Choose a future-focused degree designed for today’s competitive world:

![✅](https://static.xx.fbcdn.net/images/emoji.php/v9/t33/1/16/2705.png) BS Computer Science

Specializations in AI, Cyber Security & Data Science

![✅](https://static.xx.fbcdn.net/images/emoji.php/v9/t33/1/16/2705.png) BBA

Specializations in Finance, Banking, Data Analytics & Digital Marketing

![📍](https://static.xx.fbcdn.net/images/emoji.php/v9/t2d/1/16/1f4cd.png) Service Road (South), Near Metro Station G-13, Srinagar Highway, Islamabad
